1998 1997 1996 1995 1994 1993 1992 1991 1990 1989 1988 1987 1986 1985 1984 Skip to sidebar Ptolemy Ptutorial: Creating Directors This tutorial explains how to create new directors in Ptolemy II to implement new models of computation and communicatio

plement new models of computation and communication for concurrent software components. Specifically, it explains what a director does and then shows how to create a new director that modifies the behavior of an existing director. Specifically, it cr

avior of an existing director. Specifically, it creates a variant of the process networks (PN) director where a consumer actor reads the most recently produced value received from a producer actor, rather than reading every value in order produced by

ther than reading every value in order produced by the producer. It shows through a simple example model that the resulting director yields nondeterministic behavior. Other Ptolemy II Tutorials Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all r
